working_on: Tier 2 machinery hardening: A2 MemPalace capture-hook wrapper with failure log; B4 ADR-index/file consistency soft-warn extension to tools/validate.py; C4 STATE.md backup-tag framing softening from operational-fallback to historical-anchor.
outcome_summary: Tier 2 machinery hardening landed in one bundled session per the approved adversarial-analysis plan. A2: tools/hooks/mempalace-hook-wrapper.sh authored (tracked, executable) and wired into .claude/settings.json Stop and PreCompact hooks. The wrapper passes args + stdin through to `mempalace hook run`, captures exit code and stderr, appends a single timestamped OK/FAIL line to .claude/logs/mempalace-hook.log (gitignored under the existing .claude/* rule), and always exits 0 to the harness. Manual failure test verified via the PAIDEIA_MEMPALACE_HOOK_FORCE_FAIL=1 sentinel. Boot-recovery surfacing for the log lands as a new MemPalace capture-hook failure log subsection in docs/operations/session-build-lifecycle.md's Recovery section; mempalace-operations.md updated to reflect the wrapper indirection. B4: tools/validate.py gains a tenth check (adr_index_consistency) inside validate_repo_structure() that soft-warns under category adr_index_inconsistent when an ADR file is missing from adr/README.md's per-phase tables or when its Status core keyword (Accepted / Superseded / Deprecated / Proposed) differs from the index entry. Status comparison normalizes around the four core keywords so markdown-link decoration in the status column does not produce false positives. Manual missing-from-index test confirmed via a throwaway adr/9999-test-missing-from-index.md. New category documented in docs/operations/tools-validate-interpretation.md. C4: STATE.md backup-tag line softened from 'recoverable via git reset --hard pre-foundation-v0.0.0' to 'historical anchor (pre-machinery state; not an operational fallback target — file-level retrieval via git show pre-foundation-v0.0.0:path is the legitimate use)'. Three commits this session beyond eager-claim: A2 (wrapper + settings + ops docs + recovery hint), B4 (validate.py + interpretation doc), final close (C4 + STATE.md + CHANGELOG + archive). tools/validate.py: 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns. STATE.md updated with S-0021 next-session work item (ROADMAP.md substantive cleanup per the three-speech-acts handling in docs/operations/document-voice.md). Tier 1 + Tier 2 hardening complete; Phase 2 opens at S-0022 after S-0021 closes Phase 1.5.5.
